highlights: Improvement — Manage Snapshots and Admin Manage Snapshots dialogs are now non-blocking; the main window stays usable while deletes and uploads run in the background
Improvement — Busy dialogs are now click-draggable so you can move them aside to see the grid underneath
Improvement — App warns before closing if a critical operation (Submit Week, snapshot delete, Progress Log upload) is still running
Improvement — Submit Week locks the grid only during the brief snapshot capture; edits made afterward correctly belong to next week
Improvement — Progress Log uploads tuned to handle 150k+ row batches without timing out

Fix — Progress Log uploads now preserve the original record owner in the UserID field (format: 'uploader|assignedto'), so admins can tell whose records were uploaded even when multiple users submit in the same batch
Change — Log exports now read from the daily log files in %LocalAppData%\VANTAGE\Logs (same dialog, same filters); exported filename prefix changed from MILESTONE_Logs_ to VANTAGE_Logs_
Fix — Delete Row(s) on the Progress grid no longer locks up on large selections; loading overlay shows progress while the records are checked and deleted
Fix — Submit Week's Azure lookups now have a 60-second timeout instead of waiting indefinitely if the database is slow

New — VP vs Vtg Report tool in the Tools menu: augments a JC Labor Productivity report with Vtg Budget / Vtg Earned columns aggregated from Vantage, color-coded green/red/orange for within-1% / over-1% / not-found matches
New — Reset User Settings dialog in the Settings popup: selectively clear grid layouts, splitter positions, dialog sizes, and re-enable 'don't show again' dismissed dialogs
Fix — Schedule UDF Column Mappings dialog now shows all rows and is resizable (previously cut off the last row with no scrollbar)
Fix — ROC split now reads ShopField and Component directly from takeoff data; also accepts 'Shop'/'Field' text values in addition to 1/2
Change — AI Assistant tab removed from the Help sidebar (was a 'Coming soon' placeholder)
Fix — Sync no longer times out for users with slow internet connections
Fix — Pasted values (BudgetMHs, etc.) no longer silently revert to old values after sync
Improvement — Push now verifies exactly which rows Azure updated; missed rows automatically retry
New — Rev Bubble Items Only option for AI takeoff extraction (extracts only items inside revision bubbles)
Change — Send Missed Makeups and Rates to Admin now defaults to unchecked
Fix — Arrow key navigation no longer crashes when rapidly scrolling across grid columns
Fix — Analysis tab summary table now reliably renders data after clearing and re-syncing
Fix — Analysis tab initialization errors no longer silently prevent the summary table from loading
Fix — Email notifications restored (migrated to new Azure Communication Services resource)
Improvement — Record assignment no longer requires all activities sharing a SchedActNO to be selected together
Fix — Sync no longer silently reverts your changes when the push to Azure fails (pull is skipped, changes preserved for retry)
Fix — Sync dialog now shows clear error message when push encounters a problem
Performance — Removed ownership check from sync flow (was causing timeouts on large projects)
Fix — Resolved race condition that could skip records pushed by other users between syncs
New — ActNO Split Ownership Check tool in the Tools menu for schedulers to check for split ownership on demand
Fix — Snapshot upload tracking records no longer silently fail on large datasets (130K+ records)
Fix — Uploaded column now matches tracking records regardless of date format differences
Fix — Submit Week and Assign To operations no longer time out on large record sets
Sync dialog — Projects now sort newest-first (highest project numbers at top)
Schedule Module — Major performance improvement: snapshot data now mirrored locally on P6 import for instant grid rendering and detail interactions
Schedule Module — Detail grid edits sync to both central database and local copy automatically
Schedule Module — Submit Week refreshes local snapshot copy when the submitted week matches the loaded P6 schedule
Snapshot retention — Cutoff reduced from 28 days to 21 days
Fix — Decimal entry in % Complete column (typing 0.5 was committing as 5)
Fix — Multi-cell copy/paste restored (was completely broken by prior edit-mode check)
Fix — Arrow keys in date cells now navigate to next cell instead of scrolling the date value
Fix — Sync button commits active cell edit before syncing (prevents data loss)
Fix — Pasting dates to ActStart/ActFin validates percent rules, skips violating rows with summary message
AI Takeoff — Now available to all Estimators (no longer restricted to specific users)
Import from AI Takeoff — Save/load named import profiles for column mappings, metadata, and options
Import from AI Takeoff — ROC percentage splits applied during import based on component and ShopField matching
Import from AI Takeoff — Output modes: Import Records, Create Excel, or both
Import from AI Takeoff — Handling filter (Keep PIPE, Keep SPL, or both), BU Hardware and Fab Per DWG rollup options
ROC Manager — New Tools menu item with applicable components checklist from rate sheet
Fix — UniqueID generation now matches standard import pattern
Fix — SPL rows set to ShopField=2 (Field) during takeoff post-processing
Fix — AzureUploadUtcDate column now displays correctly in Progress grid
Takeoff — FS material group auto-correction to match pipe material on same drawing
Takeoff — ShopField post-processing corrects Shop/Field assignments on Material tab
Fix — Delete/Backspace keys blocked on read-only columns (prevents accidental clearing of AssignedTo)
Takeoff — Dual-size matching: TEE/REDT match either pipe size, others match larger size only
Takeoff — STR (strainer) makeup calculation uses larger size with 2x multiplier
Takeoff — Previous Batches rename button for admins to rename takeoff batches
Takeoff — RateSheet: SCRD simplified to 11 entries, THRD 44 entries added, 1474 key format fixes
Fix — Find & Replace no longer errors on PercentEntry/EarnQtyEntry columns (EarnMHsCalc bug)
Fix — Find & Replace and percent buttons now correctly clear ActStart/ActFin dates based on percent value
Fix — Find & Replace 'Match entire cell contents' now works for date columns
Fix — One-time migration cleans up stale dates that don't align with PercentEntry values
Progress — Cell selection stats (Count, Sum, Avg) in footer bar for selected numeric cells
Release process — GitHub CLI integration for streamlined release publishing
Takeoff — Summary tab connection counts now correctly filter to BW/SW/SCRD/BU only, with MHs columns
Takeoff — Blank component dialog prompts user before processing, GSKT defaults to size 2
Takeoff — GRV makeup fallback chain (GRV→SW→BW), expanded rate/makeup coverage (HEAT→INST, HARD-0.875, DPAN, SCRD FLG size 3)
Takeoff — Expanded fitting makeup coverage (SCRD/FLG, wildcard CPLG, classless FLG fallbacks)
Takeoff — GAUGE excluded from makeup lookup
Takeoff — Recalc now clears stale Missed Makeups, Missed Rates, No Conns, and Failed DWGs tabs
Takeoff — Recalc Excel button to reprocess existing takeoff files without re-running AWS extraction
Takeoff — Expanded rate sheet and makeup tables for better coverage (VLV classes, INST fallbacks, valve wildcards)
Progress — PrevEarnQTY now calculated during snapshot submission
Progress — Summary panel column selection now correctly shows filtered totals
Progress — Fixed flicker when changing summary column
Progress — View disabled during data load to prevent premature interaction
Progress Books — Cover page with project summary (logo, dates, Budget/Earned totals, excluded records info)
Progress Books — Include Records Assigned to Others option for multi-user books
Progress Books — Checkbox states now persist between sessions
Remember last view on startup — app reopens to the module you were last using
Progress Books — Exclude Values From Column filter with multi-select dropdown
Column visibility list sorted alphabetically for easier lookup
Ctrl+V paste in edit mode now inserts at cursor position (standard Windows behavior)
Analysis summary grid — Export button to save filtered data to Excel
Feedback Board — Column sorting and filtering on all columns
Takeoff — Send Missed to Admin preference now saved between sessions
Always-visible themed scrollbars on the Progress grid — wider, easier to grab
Grid row hover and row header colors improved across all themes
New theme variables for scrollbar and grid styling
Theme generator system — create custom themes with the new theme generator, includes Dark Forest theme
Admin Snapshots grid improvements — upgraded grid with better filtering and optimized queries
Fix SQL timeout on large bulk record reassignments
Manager role — users with Manager role can reassign records to other users without full admin access
Role management moved to Edit Users dialog — assign Admin, Estimator, and Manager roles with checkboxes
Email notifications when user roles change
Plugin Manager — install, uninstall, and manage plugins from the Settings menu
Automatic plugin updates — installed plugins are updated automatically at startup when newer versions are available
PTP TFS MECH Updater plugin — imports PTP vendor shipping reports and creates/updates TFS Mechanical fabrication activities (25.005 project)
Undo/Redo (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y) — multi-level undo for cell edits, paste operations, and cell clears in the Progress module
Fix PercentEntry arrow key navigation — arrow Down/Up now commits edit and moves to next row, typing a number auto-enters edit mode
Fix 3WLA date persistence — dates now stored in Schedule table and survive P6 re-imports
Add 3WLA Start and 3WLA Finish to Schedule Discrepancies filter
Restyle Discrepancies button to match other filter buttons (green when active)
Add selection counter to Progress grid footer (shows count for multi-select)
Fix Ctrl+V pasting into grid cell instead of column filter search field
Fix Progress sidebar button text clipping — widened toolbar so 'Not Started', 'My Records', etc. display fully
Fix UDF column visibility not persisting when navigating away from Schedule module
Remove redundant Enable checkbox from UDF Mapping dialog — columns auto-enable when headers are configured
Schedule UDF Column Mapping — map up to 5 custom P6 columns to Schedule UDF fields via Tools menu
COLUMNS button in Schedule toolbar to toggle UDF column visibility
Fix Schedule grid lines disappearing with DPI rendering settings
Fix row duplication corrupting progress fields (PercentEntry, EarnQtyEntry, EarnMHsCalc)
Add all Activity columns to Progress Book add-column dropdown (~39 → ~80 fields)
Add Earn MHs column to Schedule detail grid — auto-recalculates from % and Budget MHs
Feedback Board Notes column — admins can add notes visible to all users in the grid
Excel-style single-value paste — copy one cell, select multiple rows, Ctrl+V to fill all
Fix metadata error count not updating after row deletion
Live theme switching — Dark, Light, and Orchid themes with instant switching (no restart required)
Syncfusion packages updated to 32.2.5
Fix Progress grid scrollbar — restore native Syncfusion dark theme scrollbar
Fix last row of Progress grid being clipped by horizontal scrollbar
Remove accidental Syncfusion dependency from Installer and Updater projects
Progress bars in PercentEntry cells — colored bar shows completion at a glance
Progress bars added to P6 % and MS % columns in Schedule master grid
Gradient red styling for metadata error cells — smoother visual indicator
Drop shadow effects on Progress module sidebar buttons, toolbar, and summary text
Default button in Column Visibility dialog to restore XAML-defined column defaults
Fix metadata error count not updating after bulk percent changes or paste operations
Fix Schedule module crash on empty PlanStart/PlanFin date strings
Fix schedule detail grid not resizing when dragging splitter
Standardized EarnedQtyCalc to 2 decimal places
Fix column settings lost after updates — saved column order, widths, and visibility now persist across version changes
Change grid sorting to double-click on column headers (all three grids)
Simplified Schedule module 3WLA and MissedReasons — 3WLA dates now persist via Activities.PlanStart/PlanFin
MissedReasons only required for P6 dates within current week (not all past dates)
Yellow highlighting for 3WLA forecasts that differ from P6 planned dates
Feedback Board email notifications — admins notified on new submissions, users notified on status changes
Fix V-Start/V-Finish calculation — V-Start ignores empty strings, V-Finish shows only when ALL records are 100%
Auto-populate ActStart/ActFin in Schedule detail grid when PercentEntry changes
Enable keyboard input for null date cells in Progress and Schedule grids
Fix Prog Books layout save — name no longer reverts to Default Layout after saving
Fix false 'unsaved changes' warning when switching layouts
Simplify template management — remove clone buttons, save handles create/update automatically
Remove notification sounds from all message dialogs
Add Blank Row in Progress grid right-click menu — create new activity rows directly
Fix delete for locally-created rows not yet synced to Azure
Fix sync pull failure caused by removed SystemNO column
Submit Week now snapshots from local data — faster submits, supports historical backups
Help manual fixes for outdated column name references
Updated release notes with complete version history
Added ReleaseNotes.json update step to publishing process
Fix release notes dialog opening behind splash screen on startup
See Release Notes dialog in Settings menu — view features and changes per release
Release notes auto-show after app updates
App now appears in Windows Settings > Apps with full uninstall support
Start Menu shortcut for Windows Search integration
Automatic database migrations on version upgrades
Schedule: paste updates required fields count, Delete/Backspace clears cells
Renamed date columns SchStart/SchFinish to ActStart/ActFin for clarity
ActStart/ActFin are now required metadata fields (ActStart when % > 0, ActFin when % = 100)
MissedReasons and 3WLA dates now persist across P6 imports
P6 Import project list loads from snapshots (faster, always current)
Find/Replace: new Replace ALL and Replace BLANK modes
Snapshot submit now skips conflicts instead of aborting, with export option
Filter and grid UX fixes across Progress and Schedule modules
Fixed ManageProgressLogDialog checkbox selection and delete operation
ManageProgressLogDialog: added REFRESH button and time-range filtering
Schedule cell indicator interface for consistent cell styling
New Analysis module with 4x2 resizable grid layout and aggregated metrics
Analysis: Group By dropdown, Current User / All Users filter, multi-project selection
Analysis: color-coded % Complete cells (red/orange/yellow/green)
Removed Legacy I/O toggle setting, renamed LocalDirty filter to Unsynced
Schedule Change Log now clears on P6 import
P6 import: flexible column header matching supports multiple P6 export formats
P6 import: flexible column header matching supports multiple P6 export formats
Secondary header row detection with automatic normalization
Fixed Required Fields count not updating after past 3WLA date rejection
Block past 3WLA dates with validation message
Fixed Schedule save to persist all rows (not just filtered)
Added P6_% and %_Mismatch columns to 3WLA Excel report
Replaced P6 baseline dates with current schedule dates
Improved snapshot save performance with optimized queries
Optimized Find and Replace with batch database writes
Removed test menu from toolbar (production cleanup)
Connection error dialog now shows your public IP for firewall troubleshooting
Added Help Troubleshooting section
Created Publishing Guide for release workflow
Connection error dialog shows public IP address for firewall troubleshooting
COPY button for IP address to send to admin
Help Troubleshooting section added
First published release with auto-update support
Self-contained deployment (no .NET runtime required)
Encrypted credential configuration for production
